panels.description: Wide shot: The Time Traveller is exhausted, lowering Weena to the grassy hill. The landscape is alien and vast, the Palace of Green Porcelain is gone in the distance, ominous dark woods looming nearby. Sunset lighting, weary posture.

bubbles.text: I can no longer see the Palace. Where have we ended up?

panels.description: Medium shot: Looking toward the dark, dense tangle of the forest. Low angle, suggesting hidden dangers and sharp roots. The Time Traveller stares into the darkness with a grim expression.

bubbles.text: Better to brave the open hill than the terrors of that black wood.

panels.description: Medium close shot: The Time Traveller sitting on the grass, wrapping a protective jacket around a sleeping Weena. The forest behind them is black and silent, with occasional rustling leaves suggested by motion lines.
Wide shot: Looking up at the night sky. Brilliant, alien stars and a bright red star dominate the view. The Milky Way looks ragged. Sense of cosmic scale and awe.

bubbles.text: The stars... they are the same, yet so far from home.

panels.description: Close-up: The Time Traveller’s face, lit by moonlight, showing a sudden jolt of realization and horror. He glances down at Weena's peaceful face to suppress the thought of the Morlocks.

bubbles.text: No... it cannot be. It is too horrible to imagine.
